basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) has published the Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 on the official website, aiimsnagpur.edu.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Technical Support III position. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/ field with three years of field-based research experience or a postgraduate degree in Medical Social Work, Public Health (MPH), or a related field are eligible to apply online on or before 31-07-2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification P

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 Years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC candidates is up to a maximum period of 3 years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical), PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/MPH)
qualification.details: Three years graduate in relevant subject/field (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical) or B.Sc. (Community Health or Life Sciences) + Three years' experience (in the field-based research) or PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/MPH).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Nagpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 Years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC candidates is up to a maximum period of 3 years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III position is 31st July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a three-year graduate degree in a relevant field like Medical Social Work or B.Sc. in Community Health/Life Sciences with three years of research experience, or a PG degree in Medical Social Work/MPH.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support III role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 28,000, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) which is 20% of the basic pay.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support III position at AIIMS Nagpur through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur is www.aiimsnagpur.edu.in. You can visit this site for more information about the institute and its activities.
